name: InVogue Women Healthcare, PLLC (USA,TX)
message: In addition to specializing in obstetrics and gynecology, InVogue Women Healthcare offers primary care services for a variety of health issues including obesity, thyroid disease, hypertension and common ailments such as colds and flu.
